title: Whatsapp integration for dummies
excerpt: Hi, we need a way to integrate Whatsapp with Monday, through a phone number column and create updates and send/receive notifications, and it works very easy for dummies. Please, help us!

posts.author: Eduardosouthwild (Eduardo Blanco)
